triage_rows.key_reason: Symbol and role holdouts broke too hard for hard-candidate language, but the line is not fully dead because prior chronology evidence was genuinely strong.
No response before freeze; authoritative decision falls back to the returned reviewer majority plus the measured failure surface.
The branch must be downgraded from hard candidate because object-shift and context-leakage surfaces are too weak, but it still retains enough prior evidence to survive as candidate-only.
V119P mean/min symbol_holdout=0.4375/0.375, V119Q mean/min role_holdout=0.440476/0.333333, V119R entry/close leakage=0.375/0.666667.

interpretation: V1.19S is the scheduled three-run adversarial review for the first non-replay hard candidate after symbol holdout, role holdout, and out-of-set leakage audits.
The point of this triage is simple: if object-shift and context-leakage surfaces break, hard-candidate language must be revoked quickly rather than defended.
The authoritative freeze downgrades the branch back to candidate-only because the failure surface is too clear, even though the branch still remains alive as a narrowed candidate family.
